CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, str String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Täglich grüßt das Murmeltier.');
SELECT substringUTF8(str, 1) AS result1 FROM test_strings;
SELECT substringUTF8(str, 0) AS result2 FROM test_strings;
SELECT substringUTF8(str, -5) AS result3 FROM test_strings;
SELECT substringUTF8(str, 9, 5) AS result4 FROM test_strings;
SELECT substringUTF8(str, 20, 10) AS result5 FROM test_strings;
SELECT substringUTF8(str, 5, 100) AS result6 FROM test_strings;
SELECT substringUTF8(str, 9, 0) AS result7 FROM test_strings;
WITH (SELECT str FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS subquery SELECT substringUTF8(subquery.str, 9) AS result8;
WITH (SELECT str FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS subquery SELECT substringUTF8(subquery.str, -7, 3) AS result9;
CREATE TABLE test_results (id Int32, result String);
INSERT INTO test_results SELECT id, substringUTF8(str, 1) FROM test_strings;
SELECT tr.id, tr.result, substringUTF8(tr.result, 2) FROM test_results tr WHERE length(tr.result) > 5;
SELECT id, substringUTF8(CONCAT(str, ' Extra'), 1, 10) FROM test_strings;
SELECT t1.str, substringUTF8(t1.str, 5) AS part, t2.str AS other FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id != t2.id;
